title: elaphoglossum lucens
intro: Elaphoglossum lucens, also known as the shining elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum lucens are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Elaphoglossum lucens is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
